text:
There once was a tiny mouse named Tiny Tim who lived in a cozy burrow behind an old oak. He spent his days gathering seeds and playing hopscotch with his friends the hedgehogs.

One day, while hopping across a particularly tricky triangle, Tiny Tim stumbled into a hollowed-out walnut. Inside was an extraordinary pearl: a gemstone so beautiful it seemed to glitter with its own soft light. Intrigued, Tim scratched off a little piece of the shell with his toenail.

To his astonishment, that tiny bit of pearl held a magical property. Every night when the stars came out, the pearl glowed brighter than the moonlight. Each night, Tiny Tim visited it, marveling at the shimmering enchantment.

But as the months went by, a change came over the walnut. It seemed to whisper secrets to Tiny Tim — secrets about his future ambitions, about hidden treasures in the forest, about forgotten joys he'd left behind.
